title: MP Neuron vs Perceptron
description: Comparing the McCulloch-Pitts neuron with the Perceptron.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is true?
options: MP neuron is a special case of Perceptron
Perceptron is a special case of MP Neuron
MP neuron and Perceptron are exactly the same
MP neuron and Perceptron are completely distinct concepts

questions.prompt: Sort each property into whether it describes the Perceptron or the MP Neuron.
items: Does not have weights (i.e. every weight=1)

questions.prompt: What can't assign different levels of importance to inputs?
